effects.effect: Charge 1 Vivosaur from your Deck with a Poison Attack Skill.

effects.name: Frost Burn
effects.effect: During your End Phase: All Vivosaurs with Excite applied to them take 100 Damage.

effects.name: Cold Shout
effects.effect: Apply Excite to the defending Vivosaur.

effects.name: Cryo Combo
effects.effect: You can Discard 1 FIRE Vivosaur or 1 WATER Vivosaur from your Deck.
